title: ChatColors
description: Modern MiniMessage-powered chat formatting for 1.20+. Features stunning RGB gradients, custom HEX colors, and an intuitive GUI selector for Paper, Spigot, and Purpur.
body:
# 🌈 ChatColor: Modern MiniMessage RGB & Gradients

**The definitive chat personalization suite for Minecraft 1.20+, powered by MiniMessage for perfect RGB and Gradient rendering.**

ChatColor is a high-performance formatting plugin built for **Paper, Spigot, and Purpur**. By leveraging the power of **MiniMessage**, it allows players to express themselves with crisp **RGB gradients**, dynamic patterns, and custom HEX values—all controlled through a sleek, inventory-based **Admin GUI**.

---

### 🛡️ Support the Project via CloudExa Hosting
Support our development by using our affiliate link! Use our special coupon code for **10% OFF** your hosting.
[![Support Us](https://i.ibb.co/TDvjLX3q/test.png)](https://billing.cloudexa-hosting.com/aff.php?aff=41)

---

## ✨ Why Choose ChatColor?

- 💎 **MiniMessage Native** — Built on the modern standard for Minecraft text formatting.
- 🎨 **RGB & HEX Support** — Access 24+ built-in colors (Mint, Lavender, Coral) or define your own custom Hex.
- 🌅 **Pro Gradients** — 12+ stunning multi-stop presets including **Sunset, Cosmic, and Rose Gold**.
- 🔥 **Dynamic Patterns** — Unique character-cycling styles like **Rainbow, Galaxy, and Toxic**.
- 🖥️ **Interactive GUI Menu** — A beautiful, paginated inventory selector. No more memorizing color codes.
- 🔒 **Rank-Based Perks** — Grant specific colors or gradients to different donor groups with per-entry permissions.
- 🔌 **PAPI & Developer API** — Full PlaceholderAPI support and a clean `ChatColorAPI` for easy integration.

---

## 🛠️ Commands & Permissions
* **`/colors`** — Open the interactive color selection GUI.
* **`/colors set <style>`** — Manually apply a style via command.
* **`/colors reload`** — Hot-reload configurations instantly without a server restart.

---

> 📖 **Need Help?** > Looking for the full command list, permission nodes, or API documentation?  
> 👉 **[Visit the Official Wiki Here](https://busybeedev.net/docs/chatcolor/introduction)**

---
*Optimized for Minecraft 1.20+ | MiniMessage Chat | RGB Gradients | Custom Hex Colors*
